scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,ai,web -c blue,green,magenta "npm run start:dev --workspace=api" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev --workspace=web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared-types && npm run build --workspace=api && npm run build --workspace=web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=web && npm run lint --workspace=api
